_note: Integration fixture for FilmOrchestrator per-shot loop. Captured from a real live run of sh_005 v1/v2/v3 on 2026-04-23. The fixture's `starting_shot` is the manifest state the orchestrator received when dispatching v3 (i.e., v1 and v2 already in attempts[], shot in 'rejected' status after v2's judge). The `tool_results` are the actual outputs from v3's live render and judge. The `expected_final` is the correct post-v3 state under the NEW escalation rules (volatility detection fires because prior scores [0.783, 0.667] + current 0.833 span > 0.10).

_provenance.trajectory: v1 approved 0.783, v2 rejected 0.667, v3 escalated 0.833 (volatile)

starting_shot.description: The lighthouse keeper pushes the door open and steps inside.

prompt.primary: Same figure as reference image, same clothing, same lighthouse doorway. Phase 1: gloved hand grips the iron handle. Phase 2: he pushes the weathered wooden door inward with slow, deliberate weight. Phase 3: he steps across the threshold into the interior shadow. Handheld camera follows in a gentle push-in behind his shoulder, slight organic sway, unhurried pacing. Quiet, solitary mood. Cold naturalistic tone preserved from reference. Avoid: scene change, background change, different figure, different door, morphing hands, teleporting body, fast motion, lens flare.

routing.rationale: manual override for Seedance live smoke test (submission tier)

attempts.judge_notes: Setting and framing diverge meaningfully from the prompt...

judge.judge_notes: Three-phase action reads cleanly across keyframes: figure approaches door, pushes it inward, and steps through threshold into interior shadow — matches the prompt's Phase 1/2/3 beats. Handheld framing is over-the-shoulder with gentle push-in as specified. Cold naturalistic palette preserved.

feedback.observation: Over-the-shoulder framing reads cleanly; shoulder line held consistent.
